title: Task Force Aster
content:
{{Top|leg}}
'''Task Force Aster''' was one of the original five [[Task force/Legends|task forces]] of the [[New Republic Fifth Fleet|New Republic Fifth Battle Group]], and was created some time before [[16 ABY/Legends|16 ABY]].

It was commanded by [[Commodore/Legends|Commodore]] [[Turk Brand|Brand]]. Task Force Aster was completely composed of [[New Class Modernization Program|New Class]] warships.

This particular task force was composed of only eighteen warships compared to the standard twenty-one warships.

A three-ship detachment of Task Force Aster was assigned to recon the system of [[ILC-905 system|ILC-905]] during the [[Black Fleet Crisis]]. The recon group lost the [[Warrior-class gunship|''Warrior''-class gunship]] [[Vanguard (Warrior-class)|''Vanguard'']], and dozens of [[E-7 E-wing multi-role starfighter|E-wings]], [[T-65 X-wing starfighter/Legends|X-wings]], and [[BTL-S8 K-wing assault starfighter|K-wings]].
